outputs.description: Device ID CylanceProtect.Threat.Devices.DateFound Date and time (in UTC) when the threat was found on the device
outputs.name: CylanceProtect.Threat.Devices.ID

outputs.description: Agent version installed on the device CylanceProtect.Threat.Devices.FileStatus Current quarantine status of the file on the device.
outputs.name: CylanceProtect.Threat.Devices.AgentVersion

outputs.description: 5 = Corrupt Endpoint.IPAddress List of IP addresses for the device
outputs.name: 4 = FileRemoved

outputs.description: List of MAC addresses for the device Endpoint.Hostname Device name for the device
outputs.name: Endpoint.MACAddress

outputs.description: Unique identifier of the policy assigned to the device, or null if no policy is assigned
outputs.name: CylanceProtect.Threat.Devices.PolicyID

outputs.description: SHA-256 hash of the threat File.Path Path where the file was found on the device
outputs.name: File.SHA256

outputs.description: Device name for the device CylanceProtect.Threat.Devices.IPAddress List of IP addresses for the device
outputs.name: CylanceProtect.Threat.Devices.Hostname

outputs.description: List of MAC addresses for the device
outputs.name: CylanceProtect.Threat.Devices.MACAddress
